results.rendered_html:
palāyana n.
1〉 (wie eben) das Fliehen, Davonlaufen, Flucht  H. 802 .  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR.  ˚ne matiṃ cakre  MBH. 1,5638 . 3,15747 . 15772  (=  DRAUP. 8,57 , wo palāyane zu lesen ist). 15775 . 4,1109 . 13,6122 . 16,99 .  R. 5,33,31 .  RAGH. 19,31 .  KATHĀS. 38,126 . ˚kriyāṃ kurvanti  PAÑCAT. 63,9 . 172,10 . 246,19 .  HIT. 18,15 , v. l. yuddhe cāpyapalāyanam  BHAG. 18,43 .
— 2〉 = palyayana, paryāṇa Sattel Comm. zu  TS. 880,7 . 10 .
